source_jobs.title: Territory Sales Manager
source_jobs.description:
Hi, I’m Brayden, Founder at Sola.

Millions of homeowners no longer have adequate home insurance as roof coverage is effectively being excluded. We invented a first of its kind weather data driven wind/hail policy that enables us to reduce fraud and provide more affordable coverage. We’ve partnered with hundreds of incredible insurance agencies, and we want to partner with tens of thousands more. We need your help to get there.

Below, you’ll find more information about Sola, the role, and the next steps. Thank you for your interest and for taking the time to check us out.

I look forward to meeting you,

Brayden



About this Role:

We’re looking for a driven and talented Territory Sales Executive with a fresh perspective. This is an opportunity for someone early in their career who’s eager to grow fast and make an impact. You’ll lead new business development, product and state launches, account management, and coordinate teams across Sola. Success in this role requires curiosity, initiative, and a passion for driving product adoption and strong relationships with our insurance agency partners.

This is an in-person role based at our beautiful West Midtown Atlanta office overlooking the Atlanta skyline.



About Sola:

In the last few years, millions of home insurance policies and deductibles have suddenly skyrocketed by 3 or 4 times due to market instability. As a result, Sola launched the only affordable and reliable wind/hail coverage in the entire market - solainsurance.com http://solainsurance.com

Our mission is to provide the most reliable and affordable insurance ever created. With premium only based on your property risk, not claims history or personal details, this results in fair, consistent pricing for every customer. As Sola solidifies their position in the market as the only go-to solution for this issue, it aims to expand across all types of natural disasters and property-related risks.

Curious about what our insurance agents think? Check out their thoughts here: https://youtu.be/I3G5RSf416c?si=7Iw2yE339W3hM0DX



What you bring:

 - Love for all things business development: You are passionate about building relationships, holding yourself and others accountable to their goals, and have a track record of going above and beyond with self-driven initiatives.

 - Entrepreneurial spirit: You thrive in a startup environment where you can take initiative and think creatively. You're not just looking for a job. You’re eager to make an impact and grow with the company.

 - Territory management experience: 3-5 years experience managing a sales team across different geographies.

 - Eagerness to Grow: You’re a self-starter who’s excited about expanding your responsibilities. Whether it’s taking on new challenges or stepping outside your comfort zone, you excel in a role where every day brings something different.



What you will do:

 - Bring new business relationships to life that drive revenue: You’ll have the autonomy to visit and reach out to all insurance agencies and distribution partners that will be a good fit for Sola.

 - Bring distribution partners to the next level: You’ll play a pivotal role in engaging with distribution partners to help them achieve their goals through consistent communication. This involves providing excellent and timely customer service to agents.

 - Build a network of referrals: The insurance industry is a tight knit community. Leverage relationships within the industry to find more partners.

 - Sales System: Build and iterate upon our system for deal tracking and relationship management. Build out a process to onboard effective agencies with an open mind to new approaches.

 - Conferences and trade shows: Utilize events to find new agencies, referral partners, and existing agencies.

 - Consistent agency check ins: After onboarding agencies, utilize in person and virtual meetings to reinforce communication on the product so agents are confident to bring up Sola in their daily sales

source_jobs.title: Head of Marketing
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT SOLA

Hi, I'm Brayden, Founder at Sola, and I'll be leading the hiring for this role.



Most insurance marketing is damage control. The product is broken and the job is to make it sound like it isn't. We built something that doesn't need that treatment. Sola owns every layer of insurance, and that's what lets us build the best insurance products in the world. This is the role that changes what people think insurance can be, and for the first time, you'll have a product that actually deserves it.



I look forward to meeting you,

Brayden




THE ROLE

We need a marketer who can build and scale.

Sola is at an inflection point. We have a product that works, thousands of agents who trust us, and real momentum behind us. Now we need someone to come in, set the foundation for how marketing operates at Sola, and help us get to the next level.

We want someone who has been in the early innings before, ideally someone who has taken a company from seed or Series A into real scale, and is genuinely hungry to do it again. Not someone coasting on a strong resume, but someone who sees this as the right opportunity at the right time and wants to make their mark on it.

You’ll work directly with the founders, shape how marketing runs at Sola, and own the full picture: brand, content, agent marketing, demand gen, PR, and the vision for what this function grows into.




SCOPE OF RESPONSIBILITIES

Brand

 - Own how Sola looks, sounds, and shows up across every touchpoint, and hold the line on quality when things get busy

 - You have a strong eye for what works and what doesn’t, and everything that goes out the door should reflect that

 - Lay the brand foundation that carries us into new markets and products without losing what makes Sola distinct



Agent & Community Marketing

 - Our agents are how we grow, so build marketing programs that genuinely serve them and give them real reasons to champion Sola

 - Develop the assets, content, and enablement tools that make it easier for agents to sell and harder for them to leave

 - Get deep on the independent agent community: what they care about, where they spend their time, and what it takes to earn their trust



Content & Communications

 - Own everything we publish: website, email, social, and blog, and hold the bar high

 - This role requires someone who can write, not just direct others who do

 - Build a PR presence that gets Sola into the conversations that matter.

 - Help our founders and team show up as credible, interesting voices in the future of home insurance



Demand Generation

 - Build and run campaigns that grow our agent network and put Sola on homeowners’ radar

 - Own our paid, SEO, and social channels with a focus on getting real results out of a lean budget

 - Set up tracking and measurement that reflects what’s working, and be willing to cut what isn’t



Product Marketing

 - Home insurance is complicated enough without us making it harder to understand, translate what we offer into messaging that clicks for both agents and homeowners

 - Work closely with product and sales to develop go-to-market strategies for new launches and market expansions

 - Stay sharp on the competitive landscape so that we’re never caught off guard



Building the Function

 - Establish how marketing works at Sola: the priorities, the metrics, the processes, and the longer-term vision for the team

 - As we grow, help define what roles we need and play an active part in hiring them

 - Get strong work out of outside vendors and freelancers without letting budgets balloon

 - Put the right systems in place so the team can move quickly without things falling through the cracks





REQUIREMENTS

 - 8+ years in marketing

 - You’ve built a marketing function before, not stepped into one that was already running

 - Strong generalist with real depth across brand, content, demand gen, and comms, not someone who’s good at one thing and calls themselves a generalist

 - A strong writer wi

notes: Insurance company with a focus on sales and marketing roles.
